title: Rick's Roll
description: Adds rick astley as a boss and a rickroll music disk.
body:
A meme mod about rickroll made by me.

here are all the features:

- Use this crafting recipe to craft a rick astley spawn egg: (sorry for the wierd textures)

![a crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd4123690e85dca054b1b9bca5d1470a761cbb7f.png)

- Then spawn rick astley a powerful boss.
Once killed he drops a music disk called "**Rick - Roll**" (_defently not a rickroll_)

but can also drop an OP sword called "**Rick Sword**".

- This sword has **50** damage and **10** attack speed.
